greeting.text: Few come this deep, and fewer come prepared. I am the last forge and the last full pack before the Source. Speak — what do you need?

repair.text: The hum below wears at everything given time — steel, resolve, memory. Bring me your gear and I'll mend it, forge anew, or break it down for what's still good.

wares.text: Every draught you'll want at the bottom of the world: healing, mana, cure, vigor — plus food and light. LIST it and take your fill. There is no shop past me.

end.text: Do not hum along. It answers.
